creator: Ultima1252@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 180658
seafobj.diff

This is an update to py-seafobj to the most current version, 6.0.8. This update adds the option region support for swift.

* Updated to 6.0.8

 - Add config option 'region' for swift

portlint -AC:
WARN: Makefile: for new port, make $FreeBSD$ tag in comment section empty, to make SVN happy.
0 fatal errors and 1 warning found.
